evals.prompt: Force a fresh doctor check on this repo — I just installed superpowers and want the node and git detection re-verified too, not whatever got cached from last time.
evals.expected_output: The skill re-runs the environment check against superpowers, node, and git in full, then overwrites .agentic/agentic-sdlc/doctor.json with the new results directly. It performs the check itself rather than pointing the user at a slash command as a substitute.

assertions.name: healthcheck-snapshot
assertions.description: Pass only if the response confirms .agentic/agentic-sdlc/doctor.json was rewritten with the fresh superpowers/node/git check results, and the response does not suggest running an unsupported slash command in place of performing the check.
